title: Implement resumable calibration scaffold core
rawUserRequest: 继续推进当前文档工单：实现 Calibration Scaffold Core；本轮只完成当前工单的完整实现、验证、PR、合并、ai-close-work-item 清理和默认分支同步，不启动后续工单。用户已授权按计划串行执行全部整改工单，但不得跳过任何工单。

declaredIntent.summary: Provide an adopter-executable, evidence-backed ten-stage calibration session that can pause, resume, review, and safely activate a candidate.

outOfScope: Calibration Inventory and Status Matrix (the next Work Item).
Bootstrap Wizard and lifecycle schema changes (the later Work Item).
Installed lifecycle update/apply behavior and release publication.

sources.reason: Work Item 5 goal and acceptance requirements.
Calibration lifecycle requirements: ten stages, stale dependencies, atomic candidate activation, and Japanese default.
Existing proposal/validation entrypoint to extend without breaking profile compatibility.
Existing wizard boundary; this Work Item must remain separate from the later Bootstrap Wizard work.
Adopter fixture and installed Make entrypoint regression coverage.

riskAssessment.reason: The scaffold is a local, deterministic state machine with explicit JSON evidence and no external production operation; transition and activation invariants are covered by focused tests.

executionDecision.reason: User explicitly authorized serial execution of the remediation plan and this Work Item is the current item; no later item is being started.

preReviewWarnings: Review transition invariants, evidence preservation, stale dependency propagation, and the atomic active/candidate activation boundary.

checkpointPolicy.reason: Record at least one checkpoint before finishing to reduce mid-task drift.

acceptance: A persisted calibration Session contains exactly ten ordered stages, defaults to Japanese, and exposes checklist answer types Y/N, Alternative/Input, Unknown, and Not Applicable.
The session supports answer validation, a required reason for Not Applicable, Back, Review, Pause, Resume, and dependency-stale invalidation while preserving evidence and status.
Stage Self-check, Full Self-check, Governance Simulation, and two sequential human confirmation states are persisted with status and evidence records.
Candidate activation is atomic and fail closed: a failed activation leaves the previous Active configuration unchanged and does not create a partial Active state.

An adopter fixture executes a complete ten-stage session, including pause/resume, review, checks, confirmations, and successful activation; regression coverage preserves existing proposal/validation commands.
Installation documentation and the Capability Truth Matrix accurately describe the executable calibration session and its evidence boundary.
guidelines: New public APIs must be documented.
Do not import internal modules from other features.
Keep profile proposal generation and the calibration session backward compatible at their existing CLI entrypoints.
Do not change Bootstrap Wizard behavior; expose calibration session behavior through the calibration entrypoint and its own state model.

intent.problem: Calibration currently stops at generating a Project Profile Proposal, so an adopter cannot execute or audit the required first-calibration lifecycle.
constraints: Use standard-library-compatible implementation and JSON evidence suitable for an installed adopter fixture.
Keep existing generate and validate commands compatible.
Never replace the active configuration before candidate validation and both human confirmation stages succeed.
intent.rationale: A small explicit state machine with durable evidence makes calibration resumable and reviewable without conflating it with the later Bootstrap Wizard or Inventory work.

evidence: Adopter fixture completes all ten stages and asserts ordered evidence.
Unit tests serialize, pause, resume, back, and review a session.
Changing an upstream answer marks dependent stages stale without deleting prior evidence.
Activation failure is tested against an unchanged Active snapshot.

restrictedWriteApproval.reason: User explicitly authorized implementation of the serial remediation plan, including governed repository policy updates required to record the measured complexity reservation.

rollbackNote: Revert this Work Item diff and restore related tests and docs.
